title: TaczCurios
description: TaczCurios adds custom curios (accessories) to the game Tacz.
body:
# TaczCurios - Overview

**TaczCurios** adds custom curios (accessories) to the game **Tacz**. All bonus attributes provided by this mod are based on the dynamic player attributes from the [**Tacz Attributes Addon**](link-to-tacz-attributes-addon).

## Requirements / Dependencies

This mod requires the following as dependencies:
*   [**Tacz Attributes Addon**]
*   [**Curios API**]
*   [**TaCZ**]
*   [**Apothic Attributes**]

## Features

*   This mod provides **6 built-in Tacz curio slots** for use.
*   The inspiration for this mod comes primarily from **Warframe**, with some elements inspired by **Honkai Impact 3rd**.

## Configuration Recommendation

To achieve an enhanced experience with damage type bonuses, it is recommended to change the damage mode in the **Tacz Attributes Addon** configuration file to either **`ADDITIVE`** or **`MULTIPLICATIVE`**. This allows simultaneous support for both generic damage and specific firearm damage types.
